Class AbstractTokenProvider

java.lang.Object
dk.tij.jissuesystem.api.AbstractTokenProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
IIssueProvider
Direct Known Subclasses:
GenericProvider, GitHubProvider
public abstract class AbstractTokenProvider extends Object implements IIssueProvider
Abstract base class for token-based IIssueProvider implementations.

Stores repository context and authentication token for subclasses. Provides default implementations for managing payload builders and label parsers.

Subclasses are responsible for implementing API-specific communication to fetch labels and report issues.

See Also:

    • AbstractTokenProvider

      protected AbstractTokenProvider(String owner, String repo, String token)
      Creates a new token-based issue providers.
      Parameters:
      owner - the repository owner, organisation, or namespace
      repo - the repository or project name
      token - the authentication token used to access the provider API
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if any parameter is null or blank
